title: Codereview pass 1: missing meson caused picolibc.h/limits.h failure on aarch64 native/64
description: Finding: EC2 workflow omitted meson from dnf install. This matches root cause in project-LICHEN-vn2c. Tagged codereview. Fixed by adding meson to install deps.
close_reason: Fixed in meson install edit and 3 codereview passes complete
